/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcutlass_gemm_sm80_i16864gemm_s4.so -o libcutlass_gemm_sm80_i16864gemm_s4.so CMakeFiles/cutlass_library_gemm_sm80_i16864gemm_s4_objs.dir/generated/gemm/80/i16864gemm_s4/all_sm80_i16864gemm_s4_gemm_operations.cu.o CMakeFiles/cutlass_library_gemm_sm80_i16864gemm_s4_objs.dir/generated/gemm/80/i16864gemm_s4/cutlass_tensorop_i16864gemm_s4_256x128_128x3_tn_align32.cu.o  -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN' -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN/../lib64' -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN/../lib' -Wl,-rpath,'/usr/local/cuda/lib64' -Wl,-rpath,'/usr/local/cuda/lib' -ldl /usr/local/cuda/lib64/stubs/libcuda.so -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN' -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN/../lib64' -Wl,-rpath,'$$ORIGIN/../lib' -Wl,-rpath,'/usr/local/cuda/lib64' -Wl,-rpath,'/usr/local/cuda/lib' -ldl -lcudadevrt -lcudart  -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
